# Telluride Insulation

> Professional insulation contractor serving Telluride, Mountain Village, Ophir, and Rico, Colorado. Specializing in spray foam insulation, fiberglass, blown-in cellulose, and precision air sealing for high-altitude mountain homes.

Telluride Insulation is a local insulation company based in Telluride, CO (81435), serving the San Juan Mountains region of western Colorado. We provide expert insulation services engineered specifically for extreme alpine conditions including sub-zero temperatures, heavy snow loads, high UV exposure, and the unique building codes of San Miguel and Dolores Counties.

Our services include closed-cell and open-cell spray foam insulation, fiberglass batt installation, blown-in cellulose insulation, and precision air sealing. We work on both new construction and retrofit projects, from historic Victorian homes in downtown Telluride to luxury estates in Mountain Village. All installations are rated for conditions down to -40°F.

Phone: 970-903-0768

## Services

- [Spray Foam Insulation](https://tellurideinsulation.com/services.html#spray-foam): Closed-cell and open-cell spray foam providing air-tight seals, maximum R-value per inch, moisture control, and structural reinforcement for Telluride mountain homes
- [Fiberglass & Blown-In Insulation](https://tellurideinsulation.com/services.html#fiberglass): High-density fiberglass batts and blown-in cellulose for attics, retrofits, and standard framing — cost-effective thermal protection with fire resistance and sound dampening
- [Precision Air Sealing](https://tellurideinsulation.com/services.html#air-sealing): Professional identification and sealing of hidden air leaks to eliminate drafts, prevent ice dams, improve indoor air quality, and optimize HVAC performance

## Service Areas

- [Telluride Insulation Services](https://tellurideinsulation.com/service-areas.html): Historic Victorian preservation and modern construction insulation in Telluride's box canyon — headquarters location
- [Mountain Village Insulation](https://tellurideinsulation.com/service-areas.html): High-performance insulation for luxury estates with grand-scale architecture, floor-to-ceiling glass, and extreme ridge-line wind exposure
- [Ophir Insulation](https://tellurideinsulation.com/service-areas.html): Rugged, high-R-value insulation for off-the-grid comfort at 9,695 feet elevation in this high-alpine basin
- [Rico Insulation](https://tellurideinsulation.com/service-areas.html): Cost-effective, high-efficiency insulation solutions for the Dolores River Valley community combating temperature inversions

## Contact

- [Request a Free Quote](https://tellurideinsulation.com/contact.html): Online quote request form for spray foam, fiberglass, blown-in insulation, air sealing, thermal imaging, and soundproofing services
- [Phone](tel:9709030768): Call 970-903-0768 for immediate assistance or emergency thermal containment
